annotations.summary: order-service flash sale submit processed duplicate requestId successfully
annotations.description: During flash sale traffic, POST /api/orders/submit created more than one order for the same requestId. The visible failing operation is OrderSubmitService.submitFlashSale, but logs suggest an idempotency race.
